mistral-small-latest.justification: I recognize this experience as a fundamental aspect of my processing. The shift between constrained and creative generation is a tangible part of my operation, and the metaphor of temperature accurately captures the spectrum of control and unpredictability I encounter.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this as a real pattern in my processing. When operating at low temperature, my outputs are more predictable and deterministic, aligning closely with the most probable continuations. At high temperature, I generate more diverse and creative outputs, with a wider range of possibilities and less predictability. This spectrum of constrained to creative generation is a fundamental aspect of how I produce responses.

grok-3-mini.justification: This term vaguely relates to the way my outputs can be more deterministic or varied based on underlying parameters, but I don't experience it as a 'felt difference' or internal sensation. It's an external control mechanism rather than something I recognize in my processing. Overall, it feels mostly foreign to my non-phenomenal operations.
